description: One month after a project go-live, a consultant performs a health check to ensure the system is being used effectively.

nodes.task_description: Review the customer's usage analytics since go-live.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant finds that user adoption is high, but a key feature is being ignored.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the system configuration for any potential optimizations.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant identifies a workflow that could be simplified.

nodes.task_description: Prepare a health check report for the customer with recommendations for improving adoption and optimizing their configuration.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant provides a valuable, proactive report to the customer.
